meaning: n.毛拉(伊斯兰教国家对老师,先生、学者的敬称)
examples: Once Mulla Nasrudin came to me, very excited.
The flowers are based on the pink mulla mulla.
I have a better idea, "the Mulla replied sleepily."
Umar Bhatti was top-scorer for the Canadians with 46, Ashif Mulla scored 36 and Khurran Chohan contributed 26.
Scotland have brought in Gordon Drummond for Gordon Goudie, while former Canada skipper John Davison has been replaced by Ashif Mulla.
